questions.question_text: Did the agent greet the customer and introduce themselves by name?

answer_definitions.Yes: Agent stated their name during the greeting within the first 15 seconds of the call.
answer_definitions.No: Agent did not state their name, or greeted without a personal introduction.

questions.question_text: Did the agent verify the customer's identity (account number, registered phone, or email) before discussing account details?

answer_definitions.Yes: Agent asked for and received at least one identity verification element (account number, registered phone, or email) before accessing or discussing account-specific information.
answer_definitions.No: Agent discussed account details without first verifying the customer's identity, or did not ask for any verification at all.

sections.name: Issue Understanding
sections.description: How well the agent understood the customer's problem

questions.question_text: Did the agent let the customer fully describe their issue before responding?

answer_definitions.Yes: Agent waited for the customer to finish describing their issue before jumping in with a response or solution. The customer completed their initial description without being interrupted.
answer_definitions.No: Agent interrupted the customer while they were describing the issue, or started troubleshooting before the customer finished explaining.

questions.question_text: Did the agent restate or summarize the customer's issue to confirm understanding?

answer_definitions.Yes: Agent explicitly restated, paraphrased, or summarized the customer's issue back to them to confirm mutual understanding. Example: 'So you're saying broadcast messages have been failing since yesterday.'
answer_definitions.No: Agent moved directly to troubleshooting without confirming their understanding of the issue, or asked only clarifying questions without summarizing.

questions.question_text: Rate the agent's acknowledgement of the customer's frustration or urgency.

answer_definitions.0: Agent did not acknowledge the customer's frustration or urgency at any point in the call. No empathetic statement, no recognition of the problem's impact.
answer_definitions.1: Agent acknowledged frustration but used only generic phrases ('I understand', 'I'm sorry about that') without referencing the specific issue or its impact on the customer.
answer_definitions.2: Agent acknowledged the specific issue causing frustration, validated the customer's experience, and demonstrated understanding of the impact (e.g., 'Two days without messages affecting your business is serious — let me prioritize this').

examples.transcript_excerpt: Customer: 'This is the third time I'm calling! My messages haven't been sending for two days and I'm losing business!' Agent: 'I completely understand how frustrating that must be, especially when it's affecting your business directly. Two days without outbound messages is serious — let me prioritize getting this resolved for you right now.'
examples.reasoning: Agent acknowledged the specific issue (messages not sending for two days), validated the business impact, and committed to immediate action.

examples.transcript_excerpt: Customer: 'This is the third time I'm calling! My messages haven't been sending for two days and I'm losing business!' Agent: 'I understand. Let me look into your account.'
examples.reasoning: Agent acknowledged ('I understand') but used a generic phrase without referencing the specific frustration or business impact.

sections.name: Troubleshooting & Resolution
sections.description: Quality of the agent's troubleshooting and resolution

questions.question_text: Did the agent follow a logical troubleshooting sequence for the reported issue type?

answer_definitions.0: Agent did not follow any discernible troubleshooting sequence. Jumped to conclusions without checking relevant account states, or gave generic advice unrelated to the specific issue.
answer_definitions.1: Agent checked some relevant factors but missed important diagnostic steps, or followed a sequence that was partially logical but skipped key checks.
answer_definitions.2: Agent followed a clear, logical sequence: verified account status, checked relevant system states (message queue, template status, quality rating), identified the root cause, and explained findings to the customer.

questions.question_text: Did the agent provide a clear resolution or escalation path before ending the call?

answer_definitions.Yes: Agent provided either a concrete resolution (steps to fix the issue) or a clear escalation path (who will follow up, when, and how). The customer should leave the call knowing exactly what happens next.
answer_definitions.No: Agent ended the call without providing clear next steps, or the resolution was vague ('we'll look into it') without specific actions or timelines.

questions.question_text: Did the agent give accurate information? (Mark 'No' only if the agent stated something factually incorrect that was verifiable from the transcript.)

answer_definitions.Yes: All factual statements made by the agent appear accurate based on the transcript context. No demonstrably false claims were made.
answer_definitions.No: Agent made at least one factually incorrect statement that can be identified from the transcript context (e.g., contradicted information visible in the conversation, gave wrong process descriptions).

sections.name: Closing
sections.description: How the agent wrapped up the call

questions.question_text: Did the agent ask if the customer had any other questions or issues before closing?

answer_definitions.Yes: Agent explicitly asked whether the customer had additional questions or issues before ending the call.
answer_definitions.No: Agent closed the call without checking if the customer had additional needs.

questions.question_text: Did the agent provide a reference number, ticket ID, or summary of what was agreed upon?

answer_definitions.Yes: Agent provided at least one of: a reference/ticket number, or a verbal summary of the agreed-upon actions and next steps before ending the call.
answer_definitions.No: Agent ended the call without providing a reference number or summarizing what was agreed.
